name: Chocolate Raspberry Shortcakes
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Cold unsalted butter, cut into bits
2 tablespoons Granulated sugar, or to taste
Mint sprigs for garnish if desired
recipeInstructions:
From Gourmet/May 1991 For the shortcakes
1. In a bowl, sift together cocoa powder, flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Add butter and blend until it resembles coarse meal.
2. Add heavy cream and stir with a fork until a dough forms.
3. Divide the dough into two halves, place each on a lightly greased baking sheet, and bake in the center of a 425°F oven for 12 minutes or until a tester inserted comes out with crumbs clinging to it. Transfer to a rack to cool.
4. In a bowl, mash 3/4 cup raspberries and stir in 1 tablespoon granulated sugar and framboise. Stir in remaining raspberries.
5. In a small bowl, beat cream until holds soft peaks. Add remaining granulated sugar and beat until holds stiff peaks.
6. Cut shortcakes in half. Top each bottom half with half the raspberry mixture. Divide whipped cream between 2 shortcakes.
7. Carefully top each serving with top half of a shortcake. Sprinkle with confectioners sugar and garnish with mint. Serves: 2 Shared
